description_long: This coatrack consists of a long, horizontal metal bar supported by two vertical legs at either end, forming a rectangular frame. Five evenly spaced hooks are attached to the horizontal bar, each protruding downward for hanging coats, bags, or other items. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The structure appears sturdy, likely constructed from tubular steel or a similar metal, and is finished in a dark, matte color. The hooks are simple and functional, integrated directly into the bar. This coatrack is suitable for use in public spaces such as schools, gyms, or outdoor shelters, where durability and capacity are prioritized.
description: A minimalist, rectangular metal coatrack with five evenly spaced hooks and a sturdy, utilitarian design. The frame is dark and matte, suitable for high-traffic public or outdoor areas.
description_view_0: The coatrack is seen from the front, showing the full length of the horizontal bar and all five hooks clearly.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thin profile of the coatrack, with the hooks and bar appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the horizontal bar and hooks from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Another side view, identical to view 1, emphasizing the slimness of the structure.
